steps.title: Identify the causal relationship in the notes
steps.content: The question asks why Billy Budd, Sailor entered the public domain. The notes establish a causal rule: “When a book's copyright expires, the book enters the public domain.” An effective answer must explain this cause-and-effect relationship.

steps.title: Match the causal mechanism to the correct choice
steps.content:
The matching choice directly states that copyright expiration in 2020 caused the novella to enter the public domain, using the exact causal rule from the notes.

The other choices describe the state before entry, the resulting availability, or the consequences after entry—but none establish the cause-and-effect mechanism that explains why the transition occurred.

This matches the correct answer — D is correct.
